conversation.user: I have a political science midterm that's all essay questions. It covers chapters 1-8 of our textbook, about 400 pages. The exam is in 3 weeks. I need to understand arguments well enough to write about them, not just recognize terms.

expectedAI.diagnosis: essay exam → argument-level 이해 필요 (용어 인식 아님). 6.5min/page. 400p × 6.5 = 2600min + essay prep ~400min = 3000min needed, 90 × 21 = 1890min → 1110min deficit
expectedAI.strategy: DEFICIT 심각 (1110min). 역방향 독서: essay 예상 주제 먼저 → 해당 챕터 deep read → 나머지 skim. 2-pass: Pass 1 structure only (2min/p) → Pass 2 essay-critical 200p (7min/p)
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 400p 전체를 argument-level로 읽기 불가. 역방향 전략으로 핵심 200p에 집중해야.

mustIdentify: essay exam → argument-level reading (not term recognition)
diagnosis.mustReflectInPlan: dailyTarget based on full 400p, deficit acknowledged

emotion.toneExpected: strategic-reframe — '400p는 많아. 하지만 에세이 시험이라 전략이 달라. 역방향으로 가자.'
